title: Bridge Mac video frame queue to decode and render
spec: Add a local Swift client pipeline that accepts the checked encoded AV1 frame payload through the receive queue, decodes it with VideoToolbox when available, passes the decoded frame into the Metal render/timing path, and emits stage evidence for queue, decode, and render without making live network, product QUIC, cross-device presentation, or latency claims.
acceptance:
Swift client core exposes a local pipeline or test harness that exercises receive queue validation, VideoToolbox decode, and Metal render/timing with the checked AV1 sample
XCTest coverage verifies the successful queue/decode/render path when hardware support is available and records a precise unsupported-condition result otherwise
The pipeline emits stable Codable evidence for queue, decode, and render stages
Evidence is saved under evidence/m3-mac-video-frame-pipeline and reports under reports/qd/m3-mac-video-frame-pipeline
just macos-check passes on macOS
No live network, product QUIC, cross-device presentation, or latency claim is made
context:
platform:macos
owner:macos-orchestrator
area:Swift client video pipeline
validation:local-xcode
nonclaims:live network, product QUIC, cross-device presentation, cross-device latency
